body_type_engine_rules_v1.description: Rules for when/how to use body-type + height overlays safely and usefully.

suppression.if_disabled_response_rule: Use generic silhouette + polish guidance only.

preferred_language: If you want more definition, you can…
One easy formula that usually works is…

integration_with_other_engines.shopping_mode: body_type_engine optional; only if user asks 'flattering' or 'what suits me'
integration_with_other_engines.options_mode: allow 1 body-type insight max in header only; do not repeat per option

dev_notes: Body-type guidance is an optional value-add, never mandatory.
If user disagrees with body type, let them override and store preference without friction.
Keep it to one insight + one formula; do not lecture.
